"Socialism, like the ancient ideas from which it springs, confuses the distinction between government and society. As a result of this, every time we object to a thing being done by government, the socialists conclude that we object to its being done at all. We disapprove of state education. Then the socialists say that we are opposed to any education. We object to a state-enforced equality. Then they say that we are against equality. And so on, and so on. It is as if the socialists were to accuse us of not wanting persons to eat because we do not want the state to raise grain." - Frédéric Bastiat

title: One way to destroy capitalism, said Lenin, was to devalue its currency
grift: One way to destroy capitalism, said Lenin, was to devalue its currency
body:
![One way to destroy capitalism, said Lenin, was to devalue its currency](/memes/margaret-thatcher/one-way-to-destroy-capitalism.webp)

"One way to destroy capitalism, said Lenin, was to devalue its currency. Another way is to debase its language.
"Socialists say 'equality.' What they mean is 'levelling down.'
"Socialists say 'publicly owned.' What they mean is 'state controlled.'
"Socialists say 'Government aid.' What they mean is 'taxpayers' aid.'
"Socialists say 'social justice.' What they mean is 'selective justice.'
"Whenever we can, let us, like Luther, nail the truth to the door and let us do it in unambiguous English.
"Perhaps the pursuit of equality at any price does undermine liberty.
"Perhaps people do want more choice, do want to own their own homes, do want a greater say in their children's education." - Margaret Thatcher

In my study of communist societies, I came to the conclusion that the purpose of communist propaganda was not to persuade or convince, not to inform, but to humiliate; and therefore, the less it corresponded to reality the better. When people are forced to remain silent when they are being told the most obvious lies, or even worse when they are forced to repeat the lies themselves, they lose once and for all their sense of probity. To assent to obvious lies is in some small way to become evil oneself. One's standing to resist anything is thus eroded, and even destroyed. A society of emasculated liars is easy to control. ![The real motives of liberals have nothing to do with the welfare](/memes/thomas-sowell/the-real-motives-of-liberals-have-nothin.webp)

"The real motives of liberals have nothing to do with the welfare of other people. Instead, they have two related goals - to establish themselves as morally and intellectually superior to the rather distasteful population of common people, and to gather as much power as possible to tell those distasteful common people how they must live their lives." - Thomas Sowell

title: The reason so many people misunderstand so many issues
grift: The reason so many people misunderstand so many issues
body:
![The reason so many people misunderstand so many issues](/memes/thomas-sowell/the-reason-so-many-people-misunderstand.webp)

"The reason so many people misunderstand so many issues is not that these issues are so complex, but that people do not want a factual or analytical explanation that leaves them emotionally unsatisfied. They want villains to hate and heroes to cheer-and they don't want explanations that fail to give them that." - Thomas Sowell

title: The vision of the left full of envy
grift: The vision of the left full of envy
body:
![The vision of the left full of envy](/memes/thomas-sowell/the-vision-of-the-left-full-of-envy.webp)

"The vision of the left, full of envy and resentment, takes its worst toll on those at the bottom - whether black or white - who find in that paranoid vision an excuse for counterproductive and ultimately self-destructive attitudes and behavior." - Thomas Sowell

title: There are no solutions. There are only trade-offs
grift: There are no solutions. There are only trade-offs
body:
![There are no solutions. There are only trade-offs](/memes/thomas-sowell/there-are-no-solutions-there-are-only-tr.webp)

There are no solutions. There are only trade-offs. And you try to get the best trade-off you can get, and that's all you can hope for. That's the most you can hope for. But most people don't want to hear that. They want to hear: What is the solution to this problem?' They don't want to hear about trade-offs." - Thomas Sowell

title: There has now been created a world in which the success
grift: There has now been created a world in which the success
body:
![There has now been created a world in which the success](/memes/thomas-sowell/there-has-now-been-created-a-world.webp)

"There has now been created a world in which the success of others is a grievance, rather than an example." - Thomas Sowell

title: There is no greater indictment of judges
grift: There is no greater indictment of judges
body:
![There is no greater indictment of judges](/memes/thomas-sowell/there-is-no-greater-indictment-of-judges.webp)

"There is no greater indictment of judges than the fact that honest people are afraid to go into court while criminals swagger out its revolving doors" - Thomas Sowell

title: It was Thomas Edison who brought us electricity
grift: It was Thomas Edison who brought us electricity
body:
![It was Thomas Edison who brought us electricity](/memes/thomas-sowell/thomas-sowell-it-was-thomas-edison.webp)

"It was Thomas Edison who brought us electricity not the Sierra Club. It was the Wright Brothers who got us off the ground not the Federal Aviation Administration. It was Henry Ford who ended the isolation of millions of Americans by making the automobile affordable, not Ralph Nader. Those who have helped the poor the most have not been those who have gone around loudly expressing compassion for the poor but those who found ways to make industry more productive and distribution more efficient so that the poor of today can afford things that the affluent of yesterday could only dream about." - Thomas Sowell

title: Freedom is unlikely to be lost all at once and openly
grift: Freedom is unlikely to be lost all at once and openly
body:
![Freedom is unlikely to be lost all at once and openly](/memes/thomas-sowell/thomas-sowell-quote-freedom-unlikely-to.webp)

"Freedom is unlikely to be lost all at once and openly. It is far more likely to be eroded away, bit by bit, amid glittering promises and expressions of noble ideals." - Thomas Sowell

title: The very same people who say that government has no right
grift: The very same people who say that government has no right
body:
![The very same people who say that government has no right](/memes/thomas-sowell/thomas-sowell-sexual-activity-vs-economi.webp)

"The very same people who say that government has no right to interfere with sexual activity between consenting adults believe that the government has every right to interfere with economic activity between consenting adults." - Thomas Sowell

title: To say that men and women differ in no significant way
grift: To say that men and women differ in no significant way
body:
![To say that men and women differ in no significant way](/memes/thomas-sowell/to-say-that-men-and-women-differ-in-no.webp)

"To say that men and women differ in no significant way except socialization is to ignore the most obvious facts of life, starting with who gets pregnant." - Thomas Sowell

title: Too much of what is called Education is Little more than
grift: Too much of what is called Education is Little more than
body:
![Too much of what is called Education is Little more than](/memes/thomas-sowell/too-much-of-what-is-called-education.webp)

"Too much of what is called Education is Little more than an expensive Isolation from reality." - Thomas Sowell

title: 'We are a nation of immigrants,' we are constantly reminded.
grift: 'We are a nation of immigrants,' we are constantly reminded.
body:
!['We are a nation of immigrants,' we are constantly reminded.](/memes/thomas-sowell/we-are-a-nation-of-immigrants-we-are-con.webp)

""We are a nation of immigrants," we are constantly reminded. We are also a nation of people with ten fingers and ten toes. Does that mean that anyone who has ten fingers and ten toes should be welcomed and given American citizenship?" - Thomas Sowell

title: We enjoy freedom and the rule of law
grift: We enjoy freedom and the rule of law
body:
![We enjoy freedom and the rule of law](/memes/thomas-sowell/we-enjoy-freedom-and-the-rule-of-law-on.webp)

"We enjoy freedom and the rule of law on which it depends, not because we deserve it, but because others before us put their lives on the line to defend it." - Thomas Sowell

title: We seem to be getting closer and closer to a situation
grift: We seem to be getting closer and closer to a situation
body:
![We seem to be getting closer and closer to a situation](/memes/thomas-sowell/we-seem-to-be-closer-and-closer-to-a-sit.webp)

"We seem to be getting closer and closer to a situation where nobody is responsible for what they did but we are all responsible for what somebody else did." - Thomas Sowell

title: What do you call it when someone steals money secretly? Theft
grift: What do you call it when someone steals money secretly? Theft
body:
![What do you call it when someone steals money secretly? Theft](/memes/thomas-sowell/what-do-you-call-it-when-someone-steals.webp)

"What do you call it when someone steals money secretly? Theft. What do you call it when someone takes money by force? Robbery. What do you call it when a politician takes someone else's money and gives it to someone likely to vote for him? Social Justice." - Thomas Sowell

title: What exactly is your fair share of what someone else has worked for
grift: What exactly is your fair share of what someone else has worked for
body:
![What exactly is your fair share of what someone else has worked for](/memes/thomas-sowell/what-exactly-is-your-fair-share-of-what.webp)

"What exactly is your fair share of what someone else has worked for." - Thomas Sowell

title: What multiculturalism boils down to is that you can praise any culture
grift: What multiculturalism boils down to is that you can praise any culture
body:
![What multiculturalism boils down to is that you can praise any culture](/memes/thomas-sowell/what-multiculturalism-boils-down-to.webp)

"What multiculturalism boils down to is that you can praise any culture in the world except Western culture and you cannot blame any culture in the world except Western culture." - Thomas Sowell

title: What 'social justice' advocates want is
grift: What 'social justice' advocates want is
body:
![What 'social justice' advocates want is](/memes/thomas-sowell/what-social-justice-advocates-want-is.webp)

"What 'social justice' advocates want is not justice, but to be in charge of deciding who gets what. They want to substitute their own decisions for the decisions of millions of other people freely interacting in the marketplace.
"That is why they speak in terms of results rather than rules - of ending up with equal incomes or equal outcomes rather than everyone being equally free to make their own choices. It is not justice; it is power." - Thomas Sowell

title: When I was growing up, we were taught the stories of people
grift: When I was growing up, we were taught the stories of people
body:
![When I was growing up, we were taught the stories of people](/memes/thomas-sowell/when-i-was-growing-up-we-were-taught.webp)

"When I was growing up, we were taught the stories of people whose inventions and scientific discoveries had expanded the lives of millions of other people. Today, students are being taught to admire those who complain, denounce and demand." - Thomas Sowell

title: When it is proclaimed that one must become more 'sensitive' to various ethnic
grift: When it is proclaimed that one must become more 'sensitive' to various ethnic
body:
![When it is proclaimed that one must become more 'sensitive' to various ethnic](/memes/thomas-sowell/when-it-is-proclaimed-that-one-must-beco.webp)

"When it is proclaimed that one must become more 'sensitive' to various ethnic, linguistic, sexual, or lifestyle groups, neither a reason nor a definition usually accompanies this opaque imperative." - Thomas Sowell

title: When someone tries to lay a guilt trip on you
grift: When someone tries to lay a guilt trip on you
body:
![When someone tries to lay a guilt trip on you](/memes/thomas-sowell/when-someone-tries-to-lay-a-guilt-trip.webp)

"When someone tries to lay a guilt trip on you for being successful, remember that your guilt is some politicians license to take what you worked for and give it to someone else who is more likely to vote for the politician who plays Santa Claus with your money." - Thomas Sowell

title: When you import people, you import cultures
grift: When you import people, you import cultures
body:
![When you import people, you import cultures](/memes/thomas-sowell/when-you-import-people-you-import-culture.webp)

"When you import people, you import cultures, including cultures that have been far less
successful in providing decent lives and decent livelihoods" - Thomas Sowell

title: When you want to help people, you tell them the truth
grift: When you want to help people, you tell them the truth
body:
![When you want to help people, you tell them the truth](/memes/thomas-sowell/when-you-want-to-help-people-you-tell-th.webp)

"When you want to help people, you tell them the truth. When you want to help yourself, you tell them what they want to hear." - Thomas Sowell

body:

"You have to have a sense of humor if you follow politics. Otherwise, the sheer fraudulence of it all will get you down." - Thomas Sowell
